description: Automate wafer etch process control using ML-based anomaly detection to reduce defect rates and improve equipment uptime.
Build a Microsoft Fabric-powered ontology and knowledge graph indexing all employee skills, documents, and org relationships.
Deliver a real-time HR analytics suite covering headcount trends, attrition prediction, and talent gap analysis across all regions.
Cross-functional project to identify root causes of below-spec yield using statistical process control and AI-driven root cause analysis.
Leverage AI-driven spend analysis and supplier benchmarking to reduce procurement costs by 12% within fiscal year.
Connect internal engineering systems to Azure AI Foundry via private endpoints and APIM gateway for secure model access.
Replace paper-based safety audit processes with a digital platform backed by Cosmos DB and document intelligence parsing.
Create real-time digital twins of fabrication equipment using IoT telemetry and Azure Synapse analytics for predictive maintenance.
Identify internal talent redeployment opportunities using skill ontology matching and recommend reskilling paths via AI copilot.
Standardize enterprise data products on OneLake with governed semantic models and certified dataset publishing for all business units.
Integrate supplier EDI feeds, logistics APIs, and ERP data into a unified supply chain monitoring dashboard with AI alerting.
Apply reinforcement learning to continuously tune plasma etch recipe parameters for optimal uniformity and selectivity.
Deploy a Microsoft Copilot Studio agent grounded on internal engineering documentation, spec sheets, and failure analysis reports.
Migrate legacy Finance reporting from on-prem SSRS to Power BI with live Synapse connections and certified KPI definitions.
Deploy IoT-based environmental sensors across cleanroom facilities and build a real-time alerting platform for airborne particle thresholds.
Automate extraction and classification of engineering documents using Azure AI Document Intelligence with confidence-scored output to Cosmos DB.
Implement Azure AI Search over OneLake and Cosmos DB to enable semantic search across all employee knowledge artifacts and project content.
Build an ESG data platform tracking energy consumption, water usage, and carbon emissions across all Lam Research manufacturing sites.
Centralize wafer metrology measurements from multiple fab tools into a governed OneLake data lake with lineage tracking and quality gates.
Build a scenario modelling tool enabling HR and Finance to simulate headcount growth, skill gap evolution, and budget impact for 3-year plans.
